original_name: Peter England Men Party Blue Jeans

These blue denim jeans are crafted to offer a comfortable fit and contemporary style, perfect for summer outings and party occasions. The jeans feature a modern slim fit, subtle design details, and durable fabric ensuring long-lasting wear. Lightweight denim fabric ideal for summer comfort
Modern slim fit design for a stylish silhouette
